nasb.text: The priest shall offer up in smoke its memorial portion, part of its grits and its oil with all its incense as an offering by fire to the Lord.

esv.text: And the priest shall burn as its memorial portion some of the crushed grain and some of the oil with all of its frankincense; it is a food offering to the Lord.

cnv.text: 祭司要把供物的象徵部分，就是一部分碾過的麥粒和油，連同所有的乳香，一起焚燒，作獻給耶和華的火祭。”

ccb.text: 祭司要将一些压碎的麦穗、油及所有乳香作为象征焚烧。这是献给耶和华的火祭。”
